caption: A woman with curly hair tied up, wearing a black t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, is speaking into a professional black microphone in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall with a yellow vertical stripe. Behind her is a dark screen displaying the text "Johnson" in red. To her right, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and black, with smaller text below it that says "By 11 Logo Studio". To her left, a logo says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" in red and black. A small sign above the screen reads "Employees Only". Across the sequence, the woman maintains her position, speaking and slightly shifting her facial expression and head tilt as she communicates. The camera remains static, and the lighting and environment stay consistent throughout the clip.
